title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Star Bazaar

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Star Bazaar
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Star Bazaar! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Agra team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Star Bazaar:
Star Bazaar is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Bazaar!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
